Coluria glabra is a plant species in the family Ranunculaceae, commonly found in the Himalayan region. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, and its extracts have been found to have antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial activities, potentially providing health benefits such as wound healing, anti-aging, and protection against infections.
